---
title: "Marketing Spend Performance"
author: "YU-LIN CHUNG, 35480351"
format:
    html:
        toc: true
        theme: solar
    pdf:
        toc: true
---
```{r setup}
#| echo = FALSE
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    warning = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
```

# Introduction


# Research Question
This report use the database of will investigates whether higher marketing spend lead to higher purchase amounts, as well as different segments shows 


# Dataset Introduction
```{r}
data <- read.csv(here::here("data/35480351_Yu-Lin Chung.csv"))
clean_data <- data %>%
    drop_na(purchase_amount)
```

# Dataset Description
```{r}

```

# Results
```{r}

```
